title: cMCP TRACE Claim
description: Attestation and audit summary claim emitted by the cMCP Gateway TEE at session close.

trace_version.description: Version of the TRACE claim schema.

session_id.description: Unique identifier for the agent session.

timestamp_utc.description: UTC timestamp at which the TRACE claim was generated.

tee_public_key.description: Hex-encoded Ed25519 or similar public key for this TEE instance.

provider.description: The TEE or attestation provider that generated this report.

measurement.description: Hex-encoded measurement value; length varies by provider.

report_data.description: Hex-encoded nonce binding the TEE public key to this attestation report.

measurement_note.description: Optional human-readable note about measurement quirks, e.g. sha1-bank-fallback.

raw_evidence.description: Base64-encoded raw attestation report for independent verifier use.

attestation_generated_at.description: UTC timestamp at which the attestation report was generated by the TEE.

attestation_validity_seconds.description: Duration in seconds for which the attestation report is considered valid.

hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the policy bundle loaded at session start.

enforcement_mode.description: Enforcement mode active during this session.

policy_version.description: Semver version string of the policy bundle.

hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the approved tool catalog at session start.

drift_detected.description: True if any tool definition changed since gateway startup.

tool_calls_total.description: Total number of tool calls attempted in this session.

tool_calls_allowed.description: Number of tool calls that were allowed by policy.

tool_calls_denied.description: Number of tool calls that were denied by policy.

tool_calls_faulted.description: Number of tool calls that failed due to TEE or parse error.

tools_invoked.description: Distinct tool names invoked during this session.

session_max_sensitivity.description: Highest sensitivity level reached during this session.

compliance_domains_touched.description: List of compliance domains accessed during this session.

cross_boundary_events.description: Events where a tool call crossed a compliance domain boundary.

audit_chain_root.description: SHA-256 hex of the first entry in the audit chain for this session.

audit_chain_tip.description: SHA-256 hex of the most recent entry in the audit chain for this session.

audit_chain_length.description: Number of entries in the audit chain.

attestation_stale.description: True if the attestation report expired before the session ended.

server_identity.description: Identity of the MCP server admitted via break-glass exception.

reason.description: Human-readable reason the exception was granted.

authorized_by.description: Identity of the approver who granted the catalog exception.

timestamp.description: UTC timestamp at which the exception was granted.

catalog_exceptions.description: List of break-glass catalog exceptions active during this session.

signature.description: Base64url-encoded signature over the canonical JSON of the claim body, excluding this field.
